title: ENPH Stock Analyst Forecast Summary
text: ENPH has a consensus rating of Hold with 22 analysts covering the stock. The average price target of $40.66 represents a projected -23.12% decline over the next year, with targets ranging from a low of $23.49 (-55.59%) to a high of $62.00 (+17.22%) and a median of $41.00 (-22.48%). Rating breakdown as of May 2026 shows 3 Strong Buy, 4 Buy, 13 Hold, 2 Sell, and 1 Strong Sell ratings. Recent analyst actions show downward revisions from major firms: Barclays cut to $30, Evercore ISI to $37, and JP Morgan to $35, all maintaining Hold ratings. Financial projections estimate 2026 revenue of $1.25B (down 15.48%) and 2027 revenue of $1.34B (up 7.79%). EPS projections show 2026 EPS of $2.11 (up 63.60%) and 2027 EPS of $2.54 (up 20.32%).
